ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zipcodes" (
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zipcode */,
  "area" REAL /* Geographical area of the zipcode */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the zipcode */,
  "index" REAL /* Composite index representing various urban factors */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name where the zipcode is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the zipcode is located */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the zipcode data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the zipcode data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode where the restaurant is located */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the restaurant (e.g., $, $$, $$$) */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the restaurant */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the restaurant data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the restaurant data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_counts" (
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode */,
  "restaurant_amount" INTEGER /* Number of restaurants in the zipcode */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the restaurant count data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the restaurant count data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the factor in the composite index */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the urban factor data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the urban factor data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode for which the indicator is relevant */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the economic indicator data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the economic indicator data was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime rate entry */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode for which the crime rate is relevant */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime */,
  "rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 1000 residents */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime rate data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime rate data was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the crime rate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation" (
  "transport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation entry */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode for which the transportation data is relevant */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transportation infrastructure */,
  "distance_to_nearest_station" REAL /* Distance to the nearest station or hub */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the transportation data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the transportation data was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the transportation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
